name: Chicken Sofrito (Stir-fried)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Finely chopped green bell pepper
1 1/4 cups Drained canned Italian tomatoes, seeded and finely chopped
1 packet instant chicken broth and seasoning mix
9 ounces Skinned and boned chicken breasts, cut into 3/2-inch strips
4 pieces Pimiento stuffed green olives, sliced crosswise
1 ounce Shelled almonds, lightly toasted and ground
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet, heat 1 teaspoon olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onion, bell pepper, and garlic; sauté until the onion is translucent, about 2 to 3 minutes.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients except chicken and olives. Reduce heat to low, cover, and let simmer, stirring occasionally, for 15 minutes.
3. In a separate 10-inch nonstick skillet, heat the remaining teaspoon of olive oil over medium-high heat. Add chicken; stir-fry until golden brown on all sides.
4. Transfer chicken to the sauce, add olives, and stir to combine. Increase heat to medium and cook until chicken is cooked through and sauce is thickened, about 5 to 6 minutes.
5. Serve sprinkled with ground almonds. Makes 2 servings.
